chief_complaint: A 70-year-old female presented with a one-year history of diffuse blue-grey hyperpigmentation in a photodistributed pattern.
history: The patient received her third COVID-19 booster vaccine eight months prior to onset. She had never undergone therapy with medications classically implicated in the condition. A punch biopsy of the left cheek demonstrated brown pigment deposition with both superficial perivascular and deep focal interstitial and perivascular distribution.
exam: Vital signs and physical examination findings not provided.
correct_diagnosis: Photodistributed Hyperpigmentation Associated With COVID-19 Vaccination
differentials: Photodistributed Hyperpigmentation Associated With COVID-19 Vaccination
correct_ranking: Photodistributed Hyperpigmentation Associated With COVID-19 Vaccination
